query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_ai_analyses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workspaceId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  aiSource VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'chatgpt, manus, claude, gemini, grok, perplexity, notebooklm, other',
  analysisType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'strategy, research, case_review, risk_assessment, document_review, client_recommendation, sales_intelligence, general_notes',
  content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  tags JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of string tags',
  -- Future-ready fields
  generatedBy VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'manual' COMMENT 'manual or api — for future API integration',
  modelVersion VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Future: specific model version used',
  confidenceScore DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Future: AI confidence score 0-100',
  parentAnalysisId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Future: version history linking',
  metadata JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Future: tokens, cost, comparison data, etc.',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_workspace (workspaceId),
  INDEX idx_source (aiSource),
  INDEX idx_type (analysisType),
  INDEX idx_created (createdAt),
  FULLTEXT INDEX idx_content_search (title, content)
);
